6 #include <arcane/ArcaneTypes.h>
7 #include <arcane/IItemFamily.h>
8 #include <arcane/ItemPrinter.h>
9 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
10 #include <arcane/IMeshUtilities.h>
11 #include <arcane/ItemEnumerator.h>
12 #include <arcane/packages/Variable.h>
13 #include <arcane/IMesh.h>
14 #include <arcane/ISubDomain.h>
15 
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Utils/IXMTools/IXMTools.h"

18 #include <cassert>

20 using namespace Arcane;
21 
22 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
23 /* Class FaceAidToUidMapper */
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 
26 // #error TODO: constructeur unique; mode reload depuis la variable arcane; toujours sauver dans la variable arcane (pour pp); lid2aid (ie fin de localNewLocalFaceAid) ?
27 // #error TODO: variable arcane meme sur les slaves (pour le reload).
28 // Modif SdC : constructeur unique fait. Le maitre construit le mapping et le transmet aux esclaves. Le maitre et les esclaves connaissent le mapping
29 // complet gr�ce � la variable face_aid_memory
30 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
31 
32 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper::
33 IXMItemAidToUidMapper(Arcane::ITraceMng * traceMng,
34  Arcane::IMesh * mesh,
35  Arcane::IParallelMng * parallelMng,
36  Arcane::Integer masterId,
37  bool useMemory,
38  Arcane::VariableArrayInt64* item_aid_memory,
39  Arcane::eItemKind item_kind)
40  : Arcane::TraceAccessor(traceMng)
41  , m_mesh(mesh)
42  , m_parallel_mng(parallelMng)
43  , m_master_id(masterId)
44  , m_use_memory(useMemory)
45  , m_item_aid_memory(item_aid_memory)
46  , m_item_kind(item_kind)
47 {
48  m_is_master = (m_master_id == m_parallel_mng->commRank());
49 }
50 
51 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
52 
53 void
54 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper::
55 buildAidToLidMapping(Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView abstract_ids, Arcane::ConstArrayView<LocalIdType> local_ids, const bool do_check, const bool is_parallel)
56 {
57  if (m_use_memory) _buildAidToLidMappingWithMemory(abstract_ids,local_ids,do_check,is_parallel);
58  else _buildAidToLidMapping(abstract_ids,local_ids,do_check);
59 }
60 
61 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
62 
63 void
64 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper::
65 _buildAidToLidMapping(Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView abstract_ids, Arcane::ConstArrayView<LocalIdType> local_ids, const bool do_check)
66 {
67  Arcane::Integer nb_items = local_ids.size();
68  ARCANE_ASSERT((nb_items == abstract_ids.size()),("Abstract and local ids arrays have different sizes. Exiting"))
69  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_aid_to_lids.empty()),("Clear aid mapping before rebuilding it. Exiting"))
70 
71  // Famille des items (et leurs ItemInternal's)
72  IItemFamily * item_family = m_mesh->itemFamily(m_item_kind);
73  ItemInternalArrayView item_internals = item_family->itemsInternal();
74 
75  // Structure de contr�le de red�finition d'une face (uniquement utilis�e en mode check)
76  typedef std::map<Integer, Int64> Lid2AidMap;
77  Integer nerror = 0;
78 
79 
80  for (Integer i = 0; i < nb_items; ++i)
81  {
82  if (local_ids[i] != NULL_ITEM_LOCAL_ID)
83  {
84  if (do_check) debug(Trace::Highest) << m_item_kind << " aid=" << abstract_ids[i] << " is " << FullItemPrinter(item_internals[local_ids[i]]);
85  // Add item
86  std::pair<Aid2LidMap::iterator,bool> inserter = m_aid_to_lids.insert(Aid2LidMap::value_type(abstract_ids[i],local_ids[i]));
87  if (!inserter.second)
88  {
89  if (inserter.first->second != local_ids[i])
90  {
91  error() << m_item_kind << " aid=" << abstract_ids[i] << " has two different definition:\n"
92  << FullItemPrinter(item_internals[local_ids[i]])
93  << FullItemPrinter(item_internals[inserter.first->second]);
94  ++nerror;
95  }
96  else
97  {
98  if (do_check)
99  warning() << "Duplicated item aid " << abstract_ids[i];
100  }
101  }
102  }
103  }
104 
105  if (do_check && nerror)
106  fatal() << m_item_kind << " aid definition has " << String::plural(nerror,"error") << " (see detail above)";
107 }
108 
109 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
110 
111 void
112 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper::
113 _buildAidToLidMappingWithMemory(Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView abstract_ids, Arcane::ConstArrayView<LocalIdType> local_ids, const bool do_check, const bool is_parallel)
114 {
115 #ifdef ARCANE_DEBUG_ASSERT
116  Arcane::Integer nb_items = local_ids.size();
117 #endif
118  ARCANE_ASSERT((nb_items == abstract_ids.size()),("Abstract and local ids arrays have different sizes. Exiting"))
119  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_aid_to_lids.empty()),("Clear aid mapping before rebuilding it. Exiting"))
120 
121 
122  // Famille des items(et leurs ItemInternal's)
123 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
124  IItemFamily * item_family = nullptr ;
125  if(m_item_kind == IK_DoF)
126  {
127  assert(m_graph!=nullptr) ;
128  item_family = m_graph->linkFamily() ;
129  }
130  else
131  item_family = m_mesh->itemFamily(m_item_kind);
132 #else
133  IItemFamily * item_family = m_mesh->itemFamily(m_item_kind);
134 #endif
135  //ItemInternalArrayView item_internals = item_family->itemsInternal();
136 
137  void computeItemIdInfo();
138  Int64SharedArray own_item_ids;
139  own_item_ids.add(0); // emplacement pr�visionnel pour la taille du buffer
140  ItemVectorView own_items = item_family->view(local_ids);
141  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iItem, own_items)
142  {
143  if (iItem.localId() != NULL_ITEM_LOCAL_ID && iItem->isOwn())
144  {
145  // Envoi en mode entrelac� (aid1,uid1)(aid2,uid2)...
146  own_item_ids.add(abstract_ids[iItem.index()]);
147  own_item_ids.add(iItem->uniqueId());
148  }
149  }
150  own_item_ids[0] = own_item_ids.size()-1;
151 
152  Int64SharedArray all_item_ids;
153  if(is_parallel)
154  m_parallel_mng->gatherVariable(own_item_ids,all_item_ids,m_master_id);
155  else
156  all_item_ids = own_item_ids ;
157 
158  if (m_is_master)
159  {
160  // Rechargement des associations aid->uid pr�c�dents
161  typedef std::map<Int64,Int64> Aid2UidMap;
162  Aid2UidMap aid_to_uids;
163  VariableArrayInt64 & item_aid_memory = *m_item_aid_memory;
164  const Integer memory_size = item_aid_memory.arraySize()/2;
165 
166  for(Integer i=0;i<memory_size;++i)
167  {
168  // Relecture en mode bloc (aid1,aid2...)(uid1,uid2...)
169  const Int64 aid = item_aid_memory[i];
170  const Int64 uid = item_aid_memory[i+memory_size];
171  aid_to_uids[aid] = uid;
172  }
173 
174  // Ajout des nouveaux identifiants
175  const Integer nbSubDomain = is_parallel?m_parallel_mng->commSize():1;
176  for(Integer isd=0, offset = 0;isd<nbSubDomain;++isd)
177  {
178  const Integer size = (Integer)all_item_ids[offset]; // downcast Int64 to Integer
179  Int64ConstArrayView item_ids = all_item_ids.subConstView(offset+1, size);
180  ARCANE_ASSERT((size%2==0),("Bad data size"));
181  const Integer size2 = size/2;
182  for(Integer i=0;i<size2;++i)
183  {
184  // R�ception en mode entrelac� (aid1,uid1)(aid2,uid2)...
185  const Int64 aid = item_ids[2*i+0];
186  const Int64 uid = item_ids[2*i+1];
187 
188  if ( do_check )
189  {
190  // Version avec contr�le
191  std::pair<Aid2UidMap::const_iterator,bool> inserter = aid_to_uids.insert(Aid2UidMap::value_type(aid,uid));
192  if (!inserter.second)
193  {
194  if (inserter.first->second != uid)
195  fatal() << "Incompatible "<< m_item_kind << " aid " << aid << " redefinition : was uid " << uid << " and now " << inserter.first->second;
196  }
197  }
198  else
199  {
200  // Version sans contr�le
201  aid_to_uids[aid] = uid;
202  }
203 
204  }
205  offset += size+1;
206  }
207  all_item_ids.dispose(); // on n'en a plus besoin
208 
209  // M�morise la nouvelle base des aids et s�rialize les infos � envoyer
210  const Integer new_memory_size = aid_to_uids.size();
211  item_aid_memory.resize(2*new_memory_size);
212 
213  {
214  Integer index = 0;
215  for(Aid2UidMap::const_iterator it=aid_to_uids.begin(); it != aid_to_uids.end(); ++it,++index)
216  {
217  // Ecriture en mode bloc (aid1,aid2...)(uid1,uid2...)
218  const Int64 aid = it->first;
219  const Int64 uid = it->second;
220  item_aid_memory[index] = aid;
221  item_aid_memory[index+new_memory_size] = uid;
222  }
223  }
224 
225  // Diffusion de la taille
226  Integer full_size = item_aid_memory.size();
227  if(is_parallel)
228  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(IntegerArrayView(1,&full_size),m_master_id);
229  }
230 
231  else // esclaves
232  {
233  // Reception de la taille
234  Integer full_size;
235  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(IntegerArrayView(1,&full_size),m_master_id);
236  m_item_aid_memory->resize(full_size);
237  }
238 
239  // Update face_aid_memory on slave : broadcast from master to slaves (aid1,aid2...)(uid1,uid2...)
240  if(is_parallel)
241  m_parallel_mng->broadcast(m_item_aid_memory->asArray(),m_master_id);
242 
243  // Int�gration de nouvelles donn�es
244  {
245  const Integer size = m_item_aid_memory->size()/2;
246  Int64ConstArrayView aids = m_item_aid_memory->subView(0,size);
247  Int64ConstArrayView uids = m_item_aid_memory->subView(size,size+size);
248  Int32SharedArray lids(size);
249  item_family->itemsUniqueIdToLocalId(lids,uids,false);
250  for(Integer i=0;i<size;++i)
251  {
252  // Relecture en mode bloc (aid1,aid2...)(uid1,uid2...)
253  const Int64 aid = aids[i];
254  // const Int64 uid = all_face_id_view[i+size];
255  const Int32 lid = lids[i];
256  if (lid != NULL_ITEM_LOCAL_ID)
257  m_aid_to_lids[aid] = lid;
258  }
259  }
260 }
261 
262 Arcane::Int64 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper::getItemAidMax() const
263 {
264  if(m_use_memory)
265  {
266  VariableArrayInt64 & item_aid_memory = *m_item_aid_memory;
267  const Integer memory_size = item_aid_memory.arraySize()/2;
268  Int64 aid_max = -1 ;
269  for(Integer i=0;i<memory_size;++i)
270  {
271  const Int64 aid = item_aid_memory[i];
272  aid_max = std::max(aid_max,aid) ;
273  }
274  return aid_max ;
275  }
276  return -1 ;
277 }
278 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
279 
280 Arcane::Integer
281 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper::
282 _findLocalId(Arcane::Int64 aid) const
283 {
284  Aid2LidMap::const_iterator finder = m_aid_to_lids.find(aid);
285  if (finder == m_aid_to_lids.end())
286  return NULL_ITEM_LOCAL_ID;
287  else
288  return finder->second;
289 }
290 
291 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
292 
293 Arcane::Integer
294 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper::
295 _findLocalIdOrExit(Arcane::Int64 aid) const
296 {
297  Aid2LidMap::const_iterator finder = m_aid_to_lids.find(aid);
298  if (finder == m_aid_to_lids.end())
299  fatal() << Arcane::String::format("Cannot find {0} with abstract id {1}",m_item_kind,aid);
300  return finder->second;
301 }
302 
303 
304 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
305 
306 void
307 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemAidToUidMapper::
308 itemAbstractIdToLocalId(Arcane::Int32ArrayView face_local_ids, const Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView face_abstract_ids, const bool do_fatal) const
309 {
310  ARCANE_ASSERT((face_local_ids.size()==face_abstract_ids.size()),("local id and abstract id arrays must have same size"));
311  Arcane::Integer i = 0;
312  if (do_fatal)
313  {
314  for (Arcane::Int64ArrayView::const_iterator ite = face_abstract_ids.begin(); ite != face_abstract_ids.end();++ite,++i)
315  {
316  face_local_ids[i] = _findLocalIdOrExit(*ite);
317  }
318  }
319  else
320  {
321  for (Arcane::Int64ArrayView::const_iterator ite = face_abstract_ids.begin(); ite != face_abstract_ids.end();++ite,++i)
322  {
323  face_local_ids[i] = _findLocalId(*ite);
324  }
325  }
326 }
327 
328 
329 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
330 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
331 
332 
333 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
334 /* Class IXMItemUidToAidMapper */
335 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
336 
337 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidMapper::
338 IXMItemUidToAidMapper(Arcane::IMesh* mesh,Arcane::IParallelMng * parallel_mng, Arcane::IVariableMng* variable_mng, const Arcane::eItemKind& item_kind)
339  : m_parallel_mng(parallel_mng)
340  , m_variable_mng(variable_mng)
341  , m_item_kind(item_kind)
342 {
343  // Get Aid memory variable if exists
344  IVariable* variable = m_variable_mng->findVariable(IXMItemAidToUidMapper::itemAidMemoryVariableName(mesh,m_item_kind));
345  if (variable)
346  {
347  // Create map and compute max of aid
348  Arcane::VariableArrayInt64 item_aid_memory(variable);
349  const Integer size = item_aid_memory.size()/2;
350  Int64ConstArrayView aids = item_aid_memory.subView(0,size);
351  Int64ConstArrayView uids = item_aid_memory.subView(size,size+size);
352  m_itemAidMax = -1 ;
353  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < size; ++i)
354  {
355  m_uid2aid[uids[i]] = aids[i];
356  m_itemAidMax = std::max(m_itemAidMax,aids[i]);
357  }
358 
359  }
360 }
361 
362 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
363 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidMapper::
364 IXMItemUidToAidMapper(Arcane::IMesh* mesh, Arcane::IGraph2* graph,Arcane::IParallelMng * parallel_mng, Arcane::IVariableMng* variable_mng, const Arcane::eItemKind& item_kind)
365  : m_parallel_mng(parallel_mng)
366  , m_variable_mng(variable_mng)
367  , m_item_kind(item_kind)
368 {
369  // Get Aid memory variable if exists
370  IVariable* variable = m_variable_mng->findVariable(IXMItemAidToUidMapper::itemAidMemoryVariableName(mesh,m_item_kind));
371  if (variable)
372  {
373  // Create map and compute max of aid
374  Arcane::VariableArrayInt64 item_aid_memory(variable);
375  const Integer size = item_aid_memory.size()/2;
376  Int64ConstArrayView aids = item_aid_memory.subView(0,size);
377  Int64ConstArrayView uids = item_aid_memory.subView(size,size+size);
378  m_itemAidMax = -1 ;
379  for (Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < size; ++i)
380  {
381  m_uid2aid[uids[i]] = aids[i];
382  m_itemAidMax = std::max(m_itemAidMax,aids[i]);
383  }
384 
385  }
386 }
387 #endif
388 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
389 
390 void
391 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidMapper::
392 itemUniqueIdToAbstractId(Arcane::Int64Array& item_abstract_ids, const Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView item_unique_ids) const
393 {
394  ARCANE_ASSERT((item_abstract_ids.empty()),("Given abstract id result array must be empty"));
395  if (!(m_uid2aid.empty()))
396  {
397  item_abstract_ids.resize(item_unique_ids.size());
398  Arcane::Integer i = 0;
399  Arcane::Int64ConstArrayView::const_iterator ite = item_unique_ids.begin();
400  for (; ite != item_unique_ids.end(); ++ite,++i)
401  {
402  Arcane::Int64 uid = *ite;
403  UidToAidMap::const_iterator aid_found = m_uid2aid.find(uid);
404  if (aid_found != m_uid2aid.end())
405  {
406  item_abstract_ids[i] = aid_found->second;
407  }
408  // else item_abstract_ids[i] = NULL_ITEM_UNIQUE_ID;
409  else item_abstract_ids[i] = m_itemAidMax + uid + 1;
410  }
411  }
412 }
413 
414 Int64
415 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidMapper::
416 itemUniqueIdToAbstractId( Int64 uid) const
417 {
418  if (m_uid2aid.empty())
419  return uid ;
420  else
421  {
422 
423  UidToAidMap::const_iterator aid_found = m_uid2aid.find(uid);
424  if (aid_found != m_uid2aid.end())
425  {
426  return aid_found->second;
427  }
428  else
429  // return NULL_ITEM_UNIQUE_ID;
430  return m_itemAidMax + uid + 1;
431  }
432 }
433 
434 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
435 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
436 
437 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
438 /* Class IXMItemUidToAidVariable */
439 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
440 
441 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidVariable* ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidVariable::m_instance = NULL;
442 
443 void
444 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidVariable::
445 set(Arcane::IMesh* mesh,const Arcane::eItemKind& kind)
446 {
447  if (m_instance) delete m_instance;
448  ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidMapper uid_mapper(mesh,mesh->subDomain()->parallelMng(),mesh->subDomain()->variableMng(),kind);
449  m_instance = new ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidVariable(mesh,uid_mapper,kind);
450 }
451 
452 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
453 
454 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidVariable*
455 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidVariable::
456 get()
457 {
458  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_instance),("Cannot access to ItemConnectionUids : has not be created. Exiting"))
459  return m_instance;
460 }
461 
462 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
463 
464 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidVariable::
465 IXMItemUidToAidVariable(Arcane::IMesh* mesh, const ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidMapper& uid_mapper, const Arcane::eItemKind& kind)
466  : m_aids(Arcane::VariableBuildInfo(mesh,_variableName(kind)),kind)
467 {
468  Arcane::ItemGroup all_items = mesh->itemFamily(kind)->allItems();
469  Arcane::Int64SharedArray item_uids(all_items.size());
470  Arcane::Integer i = 0;
471  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,all_items) { item_uids[i] = iitem->uniqueId();++i;}
472  Arcane::Int64SharedArray item_aids;
473  uid_mapper.itemUniqueIdToAbstractId(item_aids,item_uids);
474  i = 0;
475  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,all_items) { m_aids[iitem] = item_aids[i];++i;}
476 }
477 
478 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
479 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidLinkVariable* ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidLinkVariable::m_instance = NULL;
480 
481 void
482 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidLinkVariable::
483 set(Arcane::IMesh* mesh,Arcane::IGraph2* graph)
484 {
485  if (m_instance) delete m_instance;
486  ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidMapper uid_mapper(mesh,graph,mesh->subDomain()->parallelMng(),mesh->subDomain()->variableMng(),IK_DoF);
487  m_instance = new ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidLinkVariable(mesh,graph,uid_mapper);
488 }
489 
490 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
491 
492 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidLinkVariable*
493 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidLinkVariable::
494 get()
495 {
496  ARCANE_ASSERT((m_instance),("Cannot access to ItemConnectionUids : has not be created. Exiting"))
497  return m_instance;
498 }
499 
500 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
501 
502 ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidLinkVariable::
503 IXMItemUidToAidLinkVariable(Arcane::IMesh* mesh, Arcane::IGraph2* graph,const ArcGeoSim::IXMItemUidToAidMapper& uid_mapper)
504  : m_aids(Arcane::VariableBuildInfo(mesh,_variableName(Arcane::IK_DoF),graph->linkFamily()->name()),Arcane::IK_DoF)
505 {
506  Arcane::ItemGroup all_items = graph->linkFamily()->allItems();
507  Arcane::Int64SharedArray item_uids(all_items.size());
508  Arcane::Integer i = 0;
509  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,all_items) { item_uids[i] = iitem->uniqueId();++i;}
510  Arcane::Int64SharedArray item_aids;
511  uid_mapper.itemUniqueIdToAbstractId(item_aids,item_uids);
512  i = 0;
513  ENUMERATE_ITEM(iitem,all_items) { m_aids[iitem] = item_aids[i];++i;}
514 }
515 
516 #endif
517 
518 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
519 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
IXMItemAidToUidMapper::itemAidMemoryVariableName
static const Arcane::String itemAidMemoryVariableName(Arcane::IMesh *mesh, Arcane::eItemKind item_kind)
Donne acces au nom de la variable de mapping pour les utilitaires mettant cette variable a dispositio...
Definition: IXMItemAidMapper.h:80
IXMItemUidToAidMapper
Classe � usage externe permettant d'obtenir des identifiants abstraits � partir d'identifiants unique...
Definition: IXMItemAidMapper.h:125
IXMItemUidToAidVariable
Classe avec la meme fonctionalite que IXMItemUidToAidMapper pour un usage intensif et dans la duree (...
